section.heading: Salary and removal of Secretary and assistants

content.p: The Secretary and his assistants shall, respectively, receive for their services such sum as may be allowed by the Board of Regents; and shall be removable by the Board of Regents whenever, in their judgment, the interests of the institution require such removal.

note.heading: Codification
note.p: R.S. § 5584 derived from act Aug. 10, 1846, ch. 178, § 7, 9 Stat. 105.
Provisions which related to semi-annual payments on the first day of January and July have been omitted.
